name: babel-o
description: Nexus-first rewrite of BabeL-X with a lightweight interactive CLI.

scripts.lint: npm run typecheck && npm run format:check && npm run deps:audit
scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && mkdir -p dist/skills && cp -r src/skills/built-in dist/skills/
scripts.test: BABEL_O_CONFIG_FILE=/tmp/babel-o-test-config.json tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 test/adapters.test.ts test/build-binary-script.test.ts test/agent-profiles.test.ts test/agent-job-registry.test.ts test/context-forker.test.ts test/agent-scheduler.test.ts test/agent-tools.test.ts test/agent-tools-runtime.test.ts test/agent-api.test.ts test/agents-command.test.ts test/agent-loop.test.ts test/agent-loop-benchmark.test.ts test/retry-policy-benchmark.test.ts test/benchmark-history.test.ts test/runner-comparison-benchmark.test.ts test/architecture-boundary.test.ts test/classifier.test.ts test/compact-summary.test.ts test/completer.test.ts test/context-assembler.test.ts test/context-regression.test.ts test/diff.test.ts test/hooks.test.ts test/logger.test.ts test/mcp.test.ts test/message-normalizer.test.ts test/optimizer-safety.test.ts test/permission-flow.test.ts test/path-mention.test.ts test/lsp-context-mention.test.ts test/attachment-references.test.ts test/prefix-cache.test.ts test/provider-recovery.test.ts test/providers.test.ts test/retry.test.ts test/run-session-flow.test.ts test/read-tool.test.ts test/list-dir-tool.test.ts test/grep-tool.test.ts test/install-script.test.ts test/tool-result-budget.test.ts test/runtime-llm.test.ts test/runtime.test.ts test/security.test.ts test/skills.test.ts test/snip-compactor.test.ts test/system-prompt-builder.test.ts test/working-set.test.ts test/token-estimator.test.ts test/tool-prompt.test.ts test/tool-trace.test.ts test/tui-renderer.test.ts test/tui-input.test.ts test/worktree.test.ts test/optimize-command.test.ts test/editor.test.ts
